<!--
Thanks for contributing to the claude-cost-optimizer repository.
Please fill in the sections below. Delete any that do not apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what this PR changes and why. -->

## Change type

- [ ] New optimization guide / cheatsheet / case study
- [ ] New plugin / skill / command / hook
- [ ] Enhancement to existing content
- [ ] Bug fix (stale pricing, broken links, typos)
- [ ] Docs only (README, CHANGELOG, CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `marketplace.json` updated if a plugin was added or version-bumped
- [ ] `README.md` updated if adding/removing components
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under the target version
- [ ] Conventional commit message (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] No hardcoded usernames, absolute paths, or internal URLs in skill content
- [ ] No secrets or tokens anywhere in the diff

## Version bump

<!-- If this PR changes behavior or adds a plugin, note the intended version bump. -->
<!-- Remove if docs-only. -->

- [ ] Patch (`x.y.Z`) -- doc fixes, typos, small scripts
- [ ] Minor (`x.Y.0`) -- new guide, new capability, enhancement
- [ ] Major (`X.0.0`) -- breaking change

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Screenshots, tool execution output, manual install+invoke steps. -->

- [ ] Installed plugin/skill locally and confirmed it works
- [ ] <additional verification if applicable>

## Related

<!-- Closes #nn or relates to #nn. Delete if none. -->
